hook.label: SSS Lead Intake Webhook — register URL in Webflow Form Submission

mapper.subject: We received your {{if(contains(1.source_url; "mareexecutive.com"); "Mare Executive"; "She Said Sail")}} inquiry, {{1.first_name}}!
mapper.body:
Hi {{1.first_name}},

Thank you for reaching out! We've received your inquiry and our team will be in touch within a few hours to discuss availability and details for your experience.

Here's a summary of what you submitted:

  • Experience: {{1.experience}}
  • Preferred Date: {{1.preferred_date}}
  • Guests: {{1.guest_count}}

We'll reach out shortly. In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email with any questions.

Warmly,
The {{if(contains(1.source_url; "mareexecutive.com"); "Mare Executive"; "She Said Sail")}} Team

{"triggering_event": "Webflow form submission — Lead Intake", "source_data": "Email: {{1.email}}, Date: {{1.preferred_date}}, Guests: {{1.guest_count}}, Source: {{1.source_url}}", "output": "Request record created: {{5.id}}. Auto-reply sent to {{1.email}}. Slack notified.", "approval_state": "AUTONOMOUS", "brand": "{{if(contains(1.source_url; \"mareexecutive.com\"); \"ME\"; \"SSS\")}}", "city": "{{1.city}}", "environment": "Production", "destination": "Airtable Requests (tblTlSB9CO4dTGodg) + Gmail + Slack #sss-ops-alerts"}

metadata.notes: REBINDING REQUIRED: Airtable connection (modules 3, 5), Gmail connection (module 6), Slack OAuth (module 7). Audit logger URL is live (module 8). AFTER IMPORT: copy this scenario webhook URL and paste into Webflow Form Submission settings. Brand is determined inline from source_url (mareexecutive.com = ME, else SSS) — no dependency on Brand Router. Idempotency key: LEAD-email-date-guestcount. Filter on module 5 prevents duplicate records.
